summary: IOKR top-1 accuracy on MIBiG data is 0.1208. IOKR top-5 accuracy on MIBiG data is 0.1708. IOKR top-10 accuracy on MIBiG data is 0.1870. IOKR top-20 accuracy on MIBiG data is 0.2121. IOKR top-200 accuracy on MIBiG data is 0.2946. IOKR AUC on
Random baseline top-1 accuracy on MIBiG data is 0.0. Random baseline top-5 accuracy on MIBiG data is 0.0014. Random baseline AUC on MIBiG data is 0.5209.
IOKR mean score for all links is 0.0105.
IOKR mean score for validated links is 0.0364.
The standardised strain correlation score is significantly enriched for validated links at the 90th percentile with a p-value of 2.483 × 10−11.
The IOKR score is significantly enriched for validated links at the 90th percentile with a p-value of 0.0139.
Links scoring above the 90th percentile on both IOKR and standardised strain correlation scores are significantly enriched for validated links with a p-value of 2.633 × 10−4.
The combined scoring function assigns the best rank to the validated link in 10 out of 15 cases tested.
The IOKR model is trained on 4138 spectra from GNPS with structural annotations.
IOKR requires only spectra and predicted molecular structures as input.
IOKR's performance depends heavily on the choice of kernel function on the spectra and on the choice of molecular fingerprint.
IOKR outperforms a randomised baseline by a considerable margin in top-n accuracy on MIBiG data.
The standardised IOKR score is defined by subtracting the expected value from the IOKR score and dividing by its variance.

The combined scoring function ℓ1/2 ranks validated link for BGC0001228 (retimycin A) at number 253. The combined scoring function ℓ1/2 ranks validated link for BGC0000241 (lomaiviticin A) at number 5.
In the case of BGC0000241 (lomaiviticin A), neither scoring function alone assigns an equal or higher score than the correct link.
The molecular fingerprint vector is composed of three concatenated sets of fingerprints: CDK Substructure, PubChem Substructure, and Klekota-Roth fingerprints.
2966 BGC-spectrum pairs were created by matching MIBiG and GNPS databases.
The validated links in the MIBiG/GNPS dataset include 2069 unique spectra and 242 unique MIBiG BGCs.
BGCs in the validated links are primarily polyketides and nonribosomal peptides, with sizes ranging from 7000 to 20000 nucleotides.
